app.title: Cerbena
app.description: Controlled Environments with Routed Browsing & Enforced Network Access.
app.lifecycle.startup.title: Preparing Cerbena
app.lifecycle.startup.subtitle: Loading profiles, policies, routes, and local runtime state.
app.lifecycle.startup.bootstrap: Starting the launcher shell and preparing the workspace.
app.lifecycle.startup.profiles: Loading profiles, identity settings, and local policy stores.
app.lifecycle.startup.feature: Preparing the current workspace and feature data.
app.lifecycle.startup.janitor: Cleaning stale network runtimes, gateways, and container residue in the background.
app.lifecycle.shutdown.title: Closing Cerbena
app.lifecycle.shutdown.subtitle: Stopping local processes, profile routes, and managed cleanup tasks.
app.lifecycle.shutdown.handoff: Preparing restart handoff and staged update state.
app.lifecycle.shutdown.processes: Stopping browser and launcher processes tied to active profiles.
app.lifecycle.shutdown.network: Stopping profile gateways, route runtimes, and container-backed networks.
app.lifecycle.shutdown.cleanup: Cleaning stale runtime files, orphaned gateways, and managed container residue.
profile.subtitle: Manage profile lifecycle, isolation options, import/export, and launch controls.
profile.tags.enterHint: Press Enter to add a tag
profile.field.name: Name
profile.field.singlePageHint: The profile launches as a strict app window without a free address bar and only uses the start-page domain.
profile.field.singlePageInvalidUrl: Single-page mode requires a valid start page with a routable host.
profile.security.systemAccessWarning: Container protection is reduced. The user accepts all risks of extension access to the host system.
profile.security.certificateIsolationHin: Wayfern does not support isolated private root certificates. Switch this profile to Camoufox before assigning custom CA trust.
profile.security.certificateIsolationWar: This profile already has custom root certificates. They can only be applied in Camoufox and are never imported into Windows.
profile.security.certificateIsolationFor: Camoufox was selected automatically because this profile uses custom root certificates and they must stay isolated from the system.
profile.security.certificateIsolationCam: Custom root certificates stay inside this Camoufox profile and do not modify the Windows trust store.
profile.security.wayfernCertificatesBloc: Wayfern cannot use isolated private root certificates. Switch the profile to Camoufox or remove the assigned certificates.
profile.runtime.runningWarning: Profile is running. Security-related changes are safer on next launch.
profile.modal.closeDirty: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?

profile.export.title: Export profile

profile.launchProgress.starting: Starting the profile and preparing its environment.
profile.launchProgress.preflight: Checking the profile and preparing workspace directories.
profile.launchProgress.policy: Applying profile network and security rules.
profile.launchProgress.network: Bringing up the profile gateway and route runtime.
profile.launchProgress.networkRuntime: Checking and downloading the required VPN/runtime tools for this route when needed.
profile.launchProgress.engine: Checking the browser engine and downloading it if needed.
profile.launchProgress.engineDownload: Downloading and installing the browser engine for first launch.
profile.launchProgress.containerImage: Building or checking the container isolation helper image.
profile.launchProgress.containerNetwork: Preparing the profile-scoped isolated container network.
profile.launchProgress.containerConfig: Importing the route config into the container.
profile.launchProgress.containerProxy: Waiting for the container proxy/runtime to become ready.

profile.wayfernTerms.description: Wayfern requires explicit terms acceptance after download before the first launch. Accept and continue?
profile.logs.title: Profile logs
profile.logs.empty: No logs were recorded for this profile in the last 24 hours.
identity.realHint: Real mode uses the launcher device's current browser, screen, locale, hardware, and WebGL characteristics as the profile baseline.
identity.autoHint: Automatic mode hides manual fields and generates a fresh platform-based identity sample each time you validate or save.
identity.preview.title: Preview
extensions.name: Name
extensions.subtitle: Import extensions from a local file or store URL, then assign them to profiles.
extensions.dropHint: Drop an extension archive here to import it directly.
extensions.noCompatibleProfiles: No compatible profiles for this engine.
extensions.filter.label: Extension list
extensions.preserveOnPanicWipe: Do not remove with panic wipe
security.certificates.title: Root Certificates
security.certificates.hint: Choose PEM, CRT, or CER certificate files for the profile or the global list.
security.blocklists.hint: URL blocklists are fetched and applied when active.
security.suffix.hint: Global suffix denylist for all profiles.
traffic.subtitle: All browser traffic goes through the mandatory gateway and is logged with decision reasons.
network.templatesEmpty: No saved connections for the selected route mode.
network.templateRequired: Select a saved connection for the current route mode.
network.templateTypeMismatch: Selected connection type does not match the current route mode.
network.defaultTemplateRequiresGlobal: Enable global VPN before selecting a default route.
network.sandbox.title: Profile network isolation
network.sandbox.subtitle: Choose how this profile is allowed to route traffic and whether host-wide compatibility is permitted.
network.sandbox.profileRequired: Select a profile to manage its network sandbox mode.
network.sandbox.unknown: Sandbox strategy has not been resolved yet.
network.sandbox.nativeWarning: This route needs a compatibility-native backend and may affect traffic outside the profile.
network.sandbox.containerNativeIsolated: This route still needs native AmneziaWG semantics, but the helper now runs inside a dedicated per-profile container sandbox.
network.sandbox.systemWideWarning: Warning: this adapter can touch the machine-wide network stack.
network.sandbox.isolatedHint: This profile currently stays on the launcher-managed isolated userspace path.
network.sandbox.migratedLegacy: This profile was auto-migrated from a legacy native AmneziaWG setup.
network.sandbox.containerPlanned: Container/VM isolation is planned, but the adapter is not available yet.
network.sandbox.containerMvp: Container mode now builds a lightweight helper image on first use, reserves a per-profile Docker-managed network, and runs the selected route helper inside that sandbox instead of using the host network stack.
network.sandbox.containerNativeUnsupport: Native-only AmneziaWG compatibility still requires a host-wide compatibility path when the container runtime is unavailable.
network.sandbox.reason.userspaceCompatib: This route is compatible with the isolated launcher-managed userspace path.
network.sandbox.reason.compatibilityPinn: This profile is explicitly pinned to host-wide compatibility mode.
network.sandbox.reason.legacyMigrated: This legacy profile was automatically moved to compatibility mode during migration.
network.sandbox.reason.globalCompatibili: Global sandbox policy currently allows a compatibility fallback for native-only routes.
network.sandbox.reason.isolatedBlockedBy: Route {route} uses Amnezia with native compatibility, so mode {mode} blocks launch instead of leaking traffic outside the profile.
network.sandbox.reason.containerSelected: Container mode is selected; Cerbena will validate Docker Desktop and available sandbox slots on launch.
network.sandbox.reason.containerReady: Docker Desktop is available. Cerbena can build the profile-scoped isolated route helper on first launch.
network.sandbox.reason.containerUnsuppor: The selected route type is not fully supported inside container isolation yet.
network.sandbox.reason.containerCapacity: All container isolation slots are busy right now ({active}/{max}).
network.sandbox.reason.containerProbeFai: Docker Desktop is not responding yet, so container isolation cannot start for this profile.
network.sandbox.reason.containerRuntimeM: Docker Desktop is not installed or cannot be reached from the launcher.
network.sandbox.blockedHint: Route {route} cannot start in this mode. Choose `Compatibility-native` or `Container / VM` instead.
network.chainHint: You can combine up to 3 nodes: VPN, V2Ray/XRay, Proxy, TOR.
settings.searchProviderHint: Select one search provider from a curated preset list.
settings.updates.title: Launcher updates
settings.updates.hint: Check GitHub releases, keep auto-update disabled by default, and stage signed launcher packages for the next exit.
settings.updates.status.downloaded: Downloaded and ready for next exit
settings.tray.enabled: Minimize to tray instead of closing
settings.tray.modal.title: Keep Cerbena in the tray?
settings.tray.modal.body: Enable tray minimization now so closing the window keeps Cerbena running in the system tray.
updater.title: Cerbena Secure Updater
updater.subtitle: Trusted update flow with visible verification and install handoff stages.
updater.previewBadge: Preview mode: no installation will be performed.
updater.summary.preview_ready: Preview mode is ready to simulate a secure update.
updater.summary.ready_to_restart: Verified update is ready to apply on restart.
updater.detail.preview_running: Preview mode simulates a secure update without changing installed files.
updater.detail.preview_discover_done: A signed preview release is available for review.
updater.detail.preview_compare_running: Comparing the installed build with the preview target.
updater.detail.preview_compare_done: The preview target is newer than the current installation.
updater.detail.preview_security_running: Loading the trusted signing prerequisites for preview validation.
updater.detail.preview_security_done: Signature and trusted-release prerequisites passed in preview mode.
updater.detail.preview_download_running: Simulating package transfer to the updater staging area.
updater.detail.preview_download_done: Preview package transfer completed without touching installed binaries.
updater.detail.preview_checksum_running: Comparing a simulated SHA-256 against the signed manifest entry.
updater.detail.preview_checksum_done: Checksum validation matched the signed preview manifest.
updater.detail.preview_relaunch_done: No files were installed and no relaunch was attempted.
updater.detail.preview_complete: Preview complete. The updater exercised every stage without installing anything.
updater.detail.live_running: Preparing the trusted standalone update flow.
updater.detail.live_discover_running: Requesting the latest signed release metadata.
updater.detail.live_discover_done: A signed release was discovered and trusted assets were enumerated.
updater.detail.live_compare_running: Comparing the installed version with the release target.
updater.detail.live_compare_done: The release target is newer and eligible for trusted update handoff.
updater.detail.live_compare_uptodate: The installed version is already current.
updater.detail.live_up_to_date: No newer release is available. The updater stopped safely.
updater.detail.live_security_running: Downloading signed checksums and validating the release signature.
updater.detail.live_security_done: The signed release manifest and detached signature are valid.
updater.detail.live_checksum_running: Comparing the package SHA-256 with the signed manifest.
updater.detail.live_checksum_done: Package hash matches the signed release manifest.
updater.detail.live_install_running: Staging the verified package for installation handoff.
updater.detail.live_relaunch_done: The trusted package is ready for the next launch step.
updater.detail.live_complete: Secure updater finished verification and staging successfully.
updater.detail.live_ready_to_restart: The verified package is staged. Restart Cerbena now to apply the update.
updater.detail.skipped: This stage was not required for the current updater run.
panicFrame.title: Panic frame
panicFrame.subtitle: Emergency cleanup for the isolated profile window.
panicFrame.cleanupBody: Cerbena will stop the active isolated browser process and wipe available cookies, history, cache, passwords, and extension storage for this profile.
panicFrame.protectedSitesCount: {count} protected sites will be retained where selective cleanup is available.

dns.policy.hint: Assign a profile level, load that level into the live DNS editor, and save the current DNS rules back into any level.
dns.policy.loaded: Policy level loaded into the DNS editor.
dns.policy.levelSaved: Policy level updated from current DNS settings.
dns.policy.deleted: Policy level reset to empty rules.

network.routeTemplateHint: Choose one of the saved templates from the Network table for this profile.
network.importLinkPrompt: Paste vmess://, vless://, trojan:// or ss://
network.torSimpleMode: No static bridge value is required for this transport.
network.error.protocolUnsupported: Selected protocol is not supported for this node type.
network.error.hostInvalid: Enter a valid host or domain.
network.error.torBridgesRequired: TOR bridges are required for obfs4.
network.error.amneziaKeyInvalid: Amnezia input must be a vpn:// link or a .conf config ([Interface]/[Peer]).
network.error.amneziaEndpointMissing: Amnezia config does not contain endpoint.
settings.subtitle: Manage default search, link routing, and sync from one place.
settings.startPageHint: Used as the default start page for newly created profiles without an explicit override.
links.global.title: Global default profile
links.global.hint: Used by default for HTTP and HTTPS. Other link and file types can be bound separately.
links.defaultBrowser.check: Check whether Cerbena is the default browser
links.defaultBrowser.status.enabled: Cerbena is currently registered as the default browser for HTTP and HTTPS.
links.defaultBrowser.status.disabled: Cerbena is not currently the default browser for HTTP and HTTPS.
links.defaultBrowser.modal.title: Check the default browser on startup?
links.defaultBrowser.modal.body: If Cerbena is already the system default browser, the next step will let you choose which profile should handle links by default.
links.defaultProfile.modal.title: Choose the default profile for links
links.defaultProfile.modal.body: Pick the profile that should be written into Settings -> Links as the global default.
links.test.title: Test link launch
links.test.hint: Open a supported link and verify which profile will handle it.
links.table.title: Supported link types
links.table.hint: Each type can inherit the global default or use its own explicit profile binding.
links.action.chooseTypeDefault: Choose by default for this type
links.notice.launched: Link launch was sent to the selected profile.
links.modal.title: Choose profile for link
links.modal.description: This link type does not have a saved profile yet. Choose how Cerbena should open it.
sync.title: Profile sync
sync.subtitle: Configure encrypted sync, check server health, and manage snapshots for the selected profile.
sync.conflictsHint: Unresolved items waiting for operator decision.
sync.snapshotsHint: Available encrypted restore points for this profile.
profile.security.passwordRequired: Enter and confirm the profile password.
profile.security.passwordMismatch: The profile passwords do not match.
profile.security.domainsHint: Manage allowed and blocked domains for this profile in one list.
profile.security.lockedLaunchBlocked: Unlock the profile before launch or cookie operations.
profile.security.systemAccessBlocked: Protected profiles cannot be launched with extension system access enabled.
profile.security.keepassxcBlocked: Protected profiles cannot be launched with KeePassXC integration enabled.
profile.security.maximumPolicyExtensions: Maximum policy profiles cannot launch while browser extensions are enabled.
profile.security.disableExtensionsLaunch: Extension launch cannot be blocked while the profile still has extensions. Remove them first or keep only the KeePassXC integration enabled.
profile.security.cookiesCopyBlocked: Cookie copy is blocked when the source or target profile is protected.
devicePosture.title: Device posture
devicePosture.subtitle: Backend host checks used for protected-profile launch decisions.
devicePosture.notChecked: Posture has not been checked yet.
devicePosture.confirmDescription: This protected profile detected warning-level host signals. Continue only if you trust this environment.
devicePosture.refusedDescription: Protected profile launch was blocked because the host posture is unsafe.
devicePosture.finding.executableInTemp: Launcher executable is running from a temporary path
devicePosture.finding.suspiciousProcesse: Suspicious inspection or interception tools are running
profile.security.wayfernCertificatesBloc: This profile has imported root certificates. Wayfern does not support isolated private CA trust, so launch was stopped. Open the profile and switch the engine to Camoufox.
profile.runtime.engineChangedReset: Engine changed. The profile workspace was reset so old browser data does not mix with the new engine.
